opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I've got absolutely no energy left, my heart pounds out of my chest every time I stand up, and I keep passing out. I've collapsed twice today just trying to get up.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's been building for months but the last couple of days I've crashed — I can't stand without nearly blacking out and I'm scared I'll fall and hit my head, and I'm on my own.

symptom_narrative.onset: crept up gradually over about 6 months, then a sharp crash in the last 2 days
symptom_narrative.duration: 6 months of getting steadily worse, dramatically worse over the last 48 hours
symptom_narrative.character: completely drained and exhausted, heart hammering, dizzy and blacking out whenever I stand
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst I've ever felt — I can't get up without nearly fainting
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: my whole body — no strength anywhere
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: there all the time, much worse standing up or doing anything at all
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: lying down flat is the only thing that helps
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing up, walking, any effort at all
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've been craving and chewing crushed ice all day for weeks, my periods are really heavy and last about 10 days, my legs feel restless and twitchy at night, and I get puffed just walking to the bathroom
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this before — my energy's been slipping for months but it's never floored me like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: basically bedbound today, collapsed twice, and I live on my own so there's no one here

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: very heavy, long periods for years

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone with no one else at home; worried about falling during a fainting episode

objective_data_offered.value: I look really pale and washed out, and I've been sitting here chewing crushed ice
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-shown on camera, not a clinician examination

objective_data_offered.value: my fingernails have gone brittle and look spoon-shaped, curving up at the edges
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-shown on camera, appearance only

objective_data_offered.value: my tongue looks red and sore and there are cracks at the corners of my mouth
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-shown on camera, appearance only

objective_data_offered.value: when I stand my heart pounds really hard and I nearly black out within seconds
